subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-05-06
subcodes.first_line: These sad events which are transpiring in the East are the results of thoughtlessness. Thoughtlessness is the worst calamity of the human race. When constitution was declared in Turkey
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @mindfulness; concentration; focus, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
